name: Latino Pawn and Jewelry Store
description_short: Latino Pawn and Jewelry Store offers instant cash loans against collateral including jewelry, electronics, watches, and musical instruments, with same-day service and no credit checks required.
description_long:
Latino Pawn and Jewelry Store is a pawn shop located in Los Angeles, California at 1724 East Florence Avenue, operating under the motto "Honesty is our Goal." The business has established itself as a collateral-based lending service serving the local community.

The company offers multiple financial services centered around pawn lending: customers can bring items of value and receive instant cash loans within minutes. They accept a broad range of collateral including jewelry (gold, silver, diamonds), electronics (TVs, computers, tablets, gaming systems), watches (all brands), musical instruments, tools (name brand power tools only), brand-name bags and shoes, bikes, and collectibles. The company also provides jewelry repair services including necklace and bracelet repair, jewelry cleaning and polishing, ring sizing, and precious stone replacement, with free inspection and quotes. Additional services include a buy/sell component for inventory, consignment arrangements, and an in-store layaway plan with free shipping on most online items.

Latino Pawn distinguishes itself through several specific offerings: they promote transparency with a stated commitment to honesty as their goal, offer a promotional rate of 0% first-month interest on loans under $100, accept diverse forms of government-issued ID (including matricula consular), and provide a mobile app (MobilePawn) for loan management, payment processing, and due date tracking. Same-day jewelry repair and same-day pawn service are emphasized.

As a pawn shop, this business is best suited for consumers needing immediate cash against collateral who lack access to traditional credit or prefer not to use it. The primary caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering physical items and are short-term solutions; customers must repay loans to recover belongings, and failure to repay results in the pawn shop retaining and selling the collateral.
address: 1724 E Florence Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001

company_info.headquarters: 1724 E Florence Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90001

pros: No credit checks required—instant qualification based on collateral value alone
Cash disbursement in minutes, enabling same-day access to funds
Accepts diverse collateral types: jewelry, electronics, instruments, watches, tools, brand items, and more
0% first-month interest promotion on loans under $100
Same-day jewelry repair service with free inspections and quotes
Mobile app (MobilePawn) for convenient loan management and payment tracking
Accepts multiple forms of government ID including matricula consular, serving immigrant communities
cons: Requires surrender of personal items as collateral—loss of item if loan is not repaid
Limited to short-term borrowing solutions; not suitable for long-term credit needs
Website does not clearly disclose interest rates or loan terms beyond the promotional 0% first month
Physical location limited to one Los Angeles address; inconvenient for non-local customers despite online inventory
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs who own valuable collateral and lack traditional credit access
Individuals seeking short-term loans without credit checks or lengthy application processes
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they are willing to temporarily pledge
Immigrant communities, given the company's acceptance of matricula consular ID
diagnosis: Latino Pawn and Jewelry Store is best for consumers who need immediate cash and own collateral (jewelry, electronics, instruments, or other valuables) they are willing to pledge temporarily. The main caveat is that this is a short-term collateral-based lending solution—if you cannot repay the loan, you lose the item permanently, making it unsuitable for long-term financing needs or as a credit-building tool.
services: Instant pawn loans against collateral (jewelry, electronics, watches, instruments, tools, bags, bikes, collectibles)
Jewelry repair (necklace and bracelet repair, cleaning, polishing, ring sizing, stone replacement)
Free shipping on most online inventory items
Mobile app (MobilePawn) for payment processing and loan management
Free inspections and quotes for jewelry repair
Same-day service for pawn loans and jewelry repair
